error_signature: Webhooks are not responding with binary data
title: Webhooks not returning binary data after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading to n8n version 1.104.1, webhooks fail to return binary data. Users report that the expected binary response is missing.
not_this_if: Webhook responses are expected to be in HTML format
root_cause: The upgrade to version 1.104.1 introduced a change in how webhook responses are handled, specifically wrapping responses in an iframe. This affects the ability to return binary data correctly.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.104.2 or later
Check the release notes for changes related to webhook responses
If necessary, set the environment variable to disable iframe sandboxing for webhooks
agent_instruction: Upgrade to n8n version 1.104.2 to resolve the binary data issue with webhooks.
